message:
test(fr-conformance): AOF cross-impl round-trip gate (br-frankenredis-ri1u)

Implements the open r73v sub-task (b): mirror of the RDB
`live_redis_rdb_reemit_loadrdb_matches_upstream` (commit 9c460ed) at
the AOF persistence layer.

* `VendoredRedis::spawn_with_aof` — spawn a vendored redis-server with
  `--appendonly yes` rooted at a caller-provided directory, so the
  caller can read `<dir>/appendonlydir/*` after a clean shutdown.
  Implementation factored into `spawn_with_flags(_, _, appendonly)`
  shared with the existing canonical-RDB spawner.
* New test `live_redis_aof_reemit_loadrdb_matches_upstream`:
  1. Spawn oracle_a in `tmp_a/`. Set `appendfsync always` so every
     write hits disk synchronously.
  2. Populate string + list + set + hash + zset shapes (deliberately
     cross the same coverage matrix as the RDB version).
  3. BGREWRITEAOF, poll `INFO PERSISTENCE` until
     `aof_rewrite_in_progress:0`. SHUTDOWN NOSAVE oracle_a so the
     manifest + AOF files are stable.
  4. Read every file under `tmp_a/appendonlydir/`. Decode the manifest
     via `parse_aof_manifest`, decode each base RDB via `decode_rdb`,
     decode each incr AOF tail via `decode_aof_replay_stream`.
  5. Re-emit base RDBs via `encode_rdb` (canonical-shape) and AOF
     tails via `encode_aof_stream`. History entries are passed through
     after a sanity `read_aof_file`. Drop everything into `tmp_b/`.
  6. Spawn oracle_b at `tmp_b/`. Verify
     GET/LLEN/LRANGE/SCARD/SMEMBERS(sorted)/HGETALL(sorted)/ZRANGE
     return identical replies to oracle_a's pre-shutdown snapshot.

Streams + HashWithTtls follow the same RDB-private-encoding caveat
noted on the RDB version of this gate; covering them at the file
level requires the byte-identical encoder selection landed in
br-frankenredis-91kt (commit eaecea1) plus end-to-end MULTI/EXEC +
SELECT + EXPIREAT integration. Scope this gate to the canonical
five-shape coverage matrix, mirroring 9c460ed.

Validated via rch:
  - cargo test -p fr-conformance --lib live_redis_aof_reemit_loadrdb_matches_upstream green
  - cargo test -p fr-conformance --lib full pass: 189/189 (188 prior + this)
  - cargo clippy -p fr-conformance --all-targets -- -D warnings clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
